text:
is an artbook by Hobby Japan Editorial Department published by Hobby Japan Co. on 13 December 1996.

Overview

The book is a collection of 3D models, figures and figurines by various modelers.

Table of Contents

Chapter I: Evangelion p.7
Chapter II: Children p.58
Chapter III: Human Works p.65
Chapter IV: A Way p.106
